title: Identify and report vehicle claim fraud indicators
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify and report vehicle claim fraud indicators demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.
